steps.title: Use the four triangles
steps.content: The diagonals divide the square into $4$ congruent right triangles. From the graph, each of those triangles has base $5$ and height $5$.

steps.title: Find the square area
steps.content: Find the area of one triangle first, then multiply by $4$ because the four congruent triangles make the full square: $$ \frac{1}{2}(5)(5)=12.5 $$ $$ 4(12.5)=50 $$ The answer is C.
